_note: Single source of truth for curated project facts that are NOT derivable from the public repo — they come from the private eval harness. docgen (bun run docgen:render) injects these into the wiki Home 'At a glance' block; the CI drift gate enforces regeneration. Prefer the bridge over hand-editing: `bun run docgen:sync-facts --golden <golden.yaml>` refreshes goldenSetSize by counting the private golden set, and `--enrichment "+0.X nDCG"` sets the curated headline claim. Then run docgen:render, review the diff, commit. `--check` fails if goldenSetSize is stale vs the golden set.
